end end end d=#P return B(x)end,function(L,n)local B=N(n)local k=function(k,G,P,y)return d(L,{k;G;P,y},n,B)end return k end,function(L)e[L]=e[L]-(-438935+438936)if 258570-258570==e[L]then e[L],h[L]=nil,nil end end,function(L)local n,d=-155483-(-155484),L[-1752-(-1753)]while d do e[d],n=e[d]-(257375-257374),(331876-331875)+n if e[d]==-814+814 then e[d],h[d]=nil,nil end d=L[n]end end,function(L,n)local B=N(n)local k=function(k)return d(L,{k},n,B)end return k end return(A(10473822-(-100249),{}))(B(x))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[n(464620-503543)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
